\tzpentry{ID4584}{Duty Viscosity Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4584 introduces Duty Viscosity Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \eta_{\text{duty}} = \frac{\tau_{\text{ext}}}{\tau_{\text{cycle}}} \implies \tau_{\text{cycle}} = \sum \tau_i \end{equation}
